sections.title: If the player does not have a max cape in their bank or inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you have in your sack?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How rude! I was only being curious.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: All the things other skillcapes do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me what they are?

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Fine... Ajjat gave me unlimited teleports to his Warrior's guild and Kamfreena lets me fight her Cyclopes without needing those annoying tokens.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Melee combat tutor added a ring of life function and the armour salesman at the Ranging guild added a magnet and undead chicken thing.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Brother Jered attached a holy wrench and Wizard Sinina enchanted the cape so I can change me spellbook.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Aubury attached all of the runecrafting tiaras, an estate agent sold me some teleports and one of the nurses at the Emir's Arena made it give me faster hitpoints.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Agility Arena guy with a Parrot pet made it lighter for me and Kaqemeex convinced the Nardah herbalist to make potions for me if I wear it and he attached a pestle and mortar, toos.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Martin Thwait made the cape better for being sneaky and the Master Crafter added a teleport to his guild before Hickton attached some grapples and a crossbow.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Duradel convinced all Slayer masters to give me a chance at repeating an assignment and the Hunting Expert added some useful teleports, too.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: A dwarf gave it a chance to give me extra ores and another dwarf made it give more experience when making gold bars and the Master Chef stopped it from burning any food.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Ignatius Vulcan added a torch for lighting up caves and the Woodcutting tutor made it easier to find bird's nests and Martin the Master Farmer made it yield more herbs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure I could make it worth your while.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about [amount of coins in inventory] gold?

lines.speaker: Wise Old Man
lines.text: It's Dionysius here. I'm using my magic to communicate to you. Don't worry.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: What are you doing in my head?

lines.speaker: Wise Old Man
lines.text: I just wanted to say congratulations [player name]. I've been watching you in your adventures - very well done.

lines.speaker: Hans
lines.text: Oh very well done [player name]. Taken you a while, but I knew you could do it.

lines.speaker: Gielinor Guide
lines.text: Ahhh [player name], I knew you had potential when I first met you. My compliments on reaching the pinnacle of your achievements.

lines.speaker: Bob the Cat
lines.text: Oh most excellently done old chap!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you keep it in a sack?

sections.title: If the player has a max cape in their inventory

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Yip. Show me the goods. I pay 80%.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Yip. No cost. What cape do you want a hood for?

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: You don't have that cape. Choose another.

sections.title: Using any max hood variant on Mac
Using any max cape variant on Mac
Using any other item on Mac
